title: Velvet Geometry
description: Ce style se caractérise par une esthétique minimaliste en rendu 3D, définie par une géométrie exceptionnellement lisse et biseautée sans arêtes vives. Les surfaces possèdent une finition mate et veloutée sous une illumination globale douce, rehaussée par une translucidité givrée et un grain numérique fin et uniforme qui ajoute une chaleur tactile à la palette de couleurs pastel.
prompt: 3D rendered minimalist illustration utilizing diffuse matte materials and a soft-body geometric aesthetic. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies on exceptionally smooth, heavily beveled geometry where all sharp corners are rounded off, creating a friendly, tactile appearance. Lighting is achieved through high-key global illumination and large area softbox lights, producing extremely soft, diffused drop shadows and gentle ambient occlusion that grounds the elements without introducing harsh contrast. Specular highlights are entirely suppressed to maintain a velvety, non-reflective finish across all solid surfaces, while any translucent elements exhibit a frosted, subsurface scattering effect. The color grading employs a low-contrast, pastel-leaning palette, utilizing {{primary_color}} for the dominant matte surfaces, {{accent_color}} for soft focal details, and {{secondary_color}} for supporting ambient elements, all unified by a warm, inviting undertone. Textural depth is introduced exclusively through a uniform, fine digital film grain applied globally over the entire composition, mimicking a subtle print or tactile noise overlay that breaks up the perfect gradients. Silhouettes are clean and crisp, defined entirely by soft volumetric shading rather than any linework or outlines. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners., 3d render, minimalist, matte finish, softbox lighting, beveled edges, pastel palette, film grain, ambient occlusion, subsurface scattering, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
background_prompt: A minimalist 3D rendered environment composed of smooth, heavily beveled geometric shapes and sweeping curved surfaces. The scene features a velvety, matte finish under soft, high-key global illumination with no harsh shadows. A low-contrast palette uses {{primary_color}} for the primary structural forms, accented by {{accent_color}} gradients and {{secondary_color}} ambient reflections. A uniform, fine digital film grain covers the entire atmospheric space, creating a warm, tactile, and completely empty backdrop.
description_en: This style features a 3D-rendered minimalist aesthetic characterized by exceptionally smooth, heavily beveled geometry with no sharp edges. Surfaces possess a velvety, matte finish under soft global illumination, accented by frosted translucency and a uniform, fine digital grain that adds a tactile warmth to the pastel-leaning color palette.
description_fr: Ce style se caractérise par une esthétique minimaliste en rendu 3D, définie par une géométrie exceptionnellement lisse et biseautée sans arêtes vives. Les surfaces possèdent une finition mate et veloutée sous une illumination globale douce, rehaussée par une translucidité givrée et un grain numérique fin et uniforme qui ajoute une chaleur tactile à la palette de couleurs pastel.
prompt_removebg: 3D rendered minimalist illustration utilizing diffuse matte materials and a soft-body geometric aesthetic. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies on exceptionally smooth, heavily beveled geometry where all sharp corners are rounded off, creating a friendly, tactile appearance. Lighting is achieved through high-key global illumination and large area softbox lights, producing extremely soft, diffused drop shadows and gentle ambient occlusion that grounds the elements without introducing harsh contrast. Specular highlights are entirely suppressed to maintain a velvety, non-reflective finish across all solid surfaces, while any translucent elements exhibit a frosted, subsurface scattering effect. The color grading employs a low-contrast, pastel-leaning palette, utilizing {{primary_color}} for the dominant matte surfaces, {{accent_color}} for soft focal details, and {{secondary_color}} for supporting ambient elements, all unified by a warm, inviting undertone. Textural depth is introduced exclusively through a uniform, fine digital film grain applied globally over the entire composition, mimicking a subtle print or tactile noise overlay that breaks up the perfect gradients. Silhouettes are clean and crisp, defined entirely by soft volumetric shading rather than any linework or outlines. The entire composition is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface, with the soft, diffused drop shadows cast directly onto this flat {{background_color}} backdrop. Edges of the geometry interact smoothly with the background, allowing intentional overflow where parts of the scene can extend beyond the visible frame and be cleanly cropped by the image boundaries., 3d render, minimalist, matte finish, softbox lighting, beveled edges, pastel palette, film grain, ambient occlusion, subsurface scattering, solid background, clean cutout
background_prompt_removebg: A minimalist 3D rendered environment composed of smooth, heavily beveled geometric shapes and sweeping curved surfaces. The scene features a velvety, matte finish under soft, high-key global illumination with no harsh shadows. A low-contrast palette uses {{primary_color}} for the primary structural forms, accented by {{accent_color}} gradients and {{secondary_color}} ambient reflections. A uniform, fine digital film grain covers the entire atmospheric space, creating a warm, tactile backdrop. In the foreground, a decorative border of rounded, floating geometric primitives frames the invisible subject, casting soft, diffused ambient occlusion shadows directly onto the flat {{background_color}} surface that grounds the entire composition.
